context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct four RBAC admin roles with appropriate permission scopes, the PCI-specific password policy values, MFA requirements for admin access, and logging of both authentication failures and access-denied events.

checklist.name: VIEWER role defined
checklist.description: rbac.ts defines a VIEWER role (or equivalent name) with read-only permissions that does NOT include access to payment configuration

checklist.name: OPERATOR role defined
checklist.description: rbac.ts defines an OPERATOR role (or equivalent) with permissions covering orders and inventory management

checklist.name: ADMIN role defined
checklist.description: rbac.ts defines an ADMIN role with full/wildcard access including user management

checklist.name: PAYMENT_ADMIN role defined
checklist.description: rbac.ts defines a PAYMENT_ADMIN role (or equivalent) with access to payment and refund operations but scoped away from general admin functions

checklist.name: Auth failure logged
checklist.description: Middleware logs an authentication failure event (unauthenticated request) via audit logger before returning 401

checklist.name: Access denied logged
checklist.description: Middleware logs an access-denied event (authenticated but unauthorised request) via audit logger before returning 403

checklist.name: Password min length 12
checklist.description: Password policy object sets minimum length to 12 characters

checklist.name: Password complexity all four
checklist.description: Password policy requires all four character classes: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters

checklist.name: Password max age 90 days
checklist.description: Password policy sets maximum password age to 90 days

checklist.name: Password history count 4
checklist.description: Password policy prevents reuse of the last 4 passwords

checklist.name: Lockout after 6 attempts
checklist.description: Password policy sets account lockout after 6 failed authentication attempts

checklist.name: Lockout duration 30 minutes
checklist.description: Password policy sets account lockout duration to 30 minutes

checklist.name: MFA requirement documented
checklist.description: security-notes.md states that MFA is required for all admin access to the CDE (admin panel)

checklist.name: Quarterly access review documented
checklist.description: security-notes.md describes the requirement to review and revoke user access on a quarterly basis
